entry.title: New IDC W52P1J19D0074 awarded to BAE SYSTEMS ORDNANCE SYSTEMS INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE AWARD IS FOR THE PRODUCTION SUPPLY OF VARIOUS EXPLOSIVES AND COMPONENTS FOR ARMED SERVICES. THE SUPPLY/REQUIREMENTS CONTRACT IS FOR FY 2019 AND 2020 AT THE HOLSTON ARMY AMMUNITION PLANT WHICH IS A GOVERNMENT OWNED CONTRACTOR OPERATED FACILITY.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC W52P1J19D0074 (P00001) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS ORDNANCE SYSTEMS INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION P00001 IS TO MAKE ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTIONS TO THE BASE AWARD.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC W52P1J19D0074 (P00002) awarded to BAE SYSTEMS ORDNANCE SYSTEMS INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS CONTRACT IS FOR THE EXPLOSIVE PRODUCTION AT HSAAP BY THE BAE. THIS MODIFICATION IS FOR THE INCORPORATION OF SEVERAL ECPS, NORS, AND RFVS FOR VARIOUS EXPLOSIVES IN WHICH BAE IS OR WILL HAVE PRODUCTION TO COMPLETE AND SUBMIT FOR INSP/ACC.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
